Class MainController

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.controller.MainController
public class MainController extends Object
Static navigation hub for the application.

Holds singleton references to every top-level page controller and the primary Stage. navigateTo(String) routes a view key to the corresponding controller's show() method. switchViews(Scene) replaces the stage's active scene.
